Mar 25 2019 CONTENTS Filter Solutions Filter Solutions ---------------- Filter Solutions (http://filter-solutions.com/) is a filter synthesis and analysis software package for passive, transmission line, active, switched capacitor, an

ansmission line, active, switched capacitor, and digital filters. It runs only on Microsoft Windows. Spring 2019: Filter Solutions licenses are available to EECS classes for EECS educational purposes only. 32 floating licenses were donate

l purposes only. 32 floating licenses were donated by Nuhertz Technologies to Prof Shana'a in March 2019. ISG is running a networked license server for it. The licenses expire on 12/31/2020. Filter Solutions is installed on one or more o

Filter Solutions is installed on one or more of the ISG Windows remote desktop servers. Please contact ISG (inst@eecs.berkeley.edu) for more information. Classes that use it include EE240A/B, EE247, and EE290. It was previously used

0A/B, EE247, and EE290. It was previously used by EE290C in Fall 2005 and EE247 in Fall 2006. Download the software from https://nuhertz.com/members-only/login. Username: BerkeleyNetwork Password: kfiut6alftewq12z Download the produc

Password: kfiut6alftewq12z Download the product: "For FULL Synthesis Power: Filter Solutions 2019" Email users the client license file: \\fileservice\iesg\EESoftware\Filtersolution\FS16\flexlm\client\nuhertz.lic. Ask them to download and save

client\nuhertz.lic. Ask them to download and save nuhertz.lic in a location such as c:\temp. Add this license server in the Windows System Variable: NUHERTZ_LICENSE_FILE = 27023@license-srv.eecs.berkeley.edu Then start Filtersolution. On the

berkeley.edu Then start Filtersolution. On the license page, do NOT enter the user name or password, instead click on: "Fetch Nuhertz.lic License file." Then choose c:\temp\nuhertz.lic. Then it should find the license server. Vendor: Nuhertz
